nasb.text: But this I say, brethren, the time has been shortened, so that from now on those who have wives should be as though they had none;

esv.text: This is what I mean, brothers: the appointed time has grown very short. From now on, let those who have wives live as though they had none,

cnv.text: 弟兄們，我是說時候不多了。從今以後，有妻子的要像沒有妻子的，

ccb.text: 弟兄们，我告诉你们，时日不多了，从今以后，那些有妻子的，要像没有妻子的；

csbs.text: 弟兄们，我要说这一点：时候不多了！从此有妻子的，要像没有妻子的；
